note: Starter catalog used to power the interactive explorer. Replace/extend entries and validate details against primary sources.

datasets.name: ADNI (Alzheimer’s Disease Neuroimaging Initiative) — example entry
datasets.description: Large longitudinal study often used for MRI/PET/clinical biomarkers research. This entry is a placeholder you should validate.
datasets.notes: Verify modalities, demographics, and access rules before using in analysis.

datasets.name: AIBL (Australian Imaging, Biomarkers and Lifestyle) — example entry
datasets.description: Australian cohort with imaging and biomarker data (placeholder).
datasets.notes: Add official access link and confirm data availability.

datasets.name: OASIS (Open Access Series of Imaging Studies) — example entry
datasets.notes: Confirm which OASIS release you reference (OASIS-1/2/3) and its inclusion criteria.

datasets.name: UK Biobank — example entry
datasets.description: Large population cohort with imaging, genetics, and extensive phenotyping (placeholder).
datasets.notes: Not AD-specific; often used for dementia risk factors and imaging-derived phenotypes.

datasets.name: EPAD (European Prevention of Alzheimer’s Dementia) — example entry
datasets.notes: Confirm participating countries/sites and modalities actually shared.

datasets.name: ADSP (Alzheimer’s Disease Sequencing Project) — example entry
datasets.notes: Add correct access portal and whether linked phenotypes are available.

datasets.name: ROSMAP — example entry
datasets.notes: Add the official repository link and confirm which omics layers are shared.

datasets.name: AddNeuroMed — example entry
datasets.notes: Validate accessibility and dataset status (active / archived / harmonized).
